title: lantana camara var. sanguinea
intro: Lantana camara var. sanguinea, also known as Red Lantana, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the Verbenaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Lantana camara var. sanguinea include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant and immunomodulatory effects. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of the plant are used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health issues, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
